requestor.name: STRING - Full name of the person making the request
requestor.contactInfo: STRING - Email or other contact method
requestor.targetSystem: STRING - Application/system affected by this requirement

currentState.problemDescription: STRING - Clear description of the current problem or situation
currentState.frequency: STRING - How often this problem occurs (daily, weekly, monthly, etc.)
currentState.businessImpact: STRING - Quantified consequences and pain points
currentState.currentWorkarounds: STRING - How users currently cope with the problem
currentState.constraints: ARRAY of STRINGS - Known limitations or restrictions

desiredFutureState.idealVision: STRING - Optimal solution outcome described in business terms
desiredFutureState.minimumViableSolution: STRING - Smallest useful improvement that would add value
desiredFutureState.successCriteria: ARRAY of STRINGS - Measurable outcomes that define success
desiredFutureState.referenceExamples: ARRAY of STRINGS - Similar solutions seen elsewhere
desiredFutureState.businessOutcomes: ARRAY of STRINGS - Expected business benefits

stakeholderAnalysis.primaryUsers: ARRAY of STRINGS - Direct beneficiaries of the solution
stakeholderAnalysis.secondaryUsers: ARRAY of STRINGS - Indirectly affected parties
stakeholderAnalysis.decisionMakers: ARRAY of STRINGS - People who approve/influence the solution
stakeholderAnalysis.organizationalBenefits: STRING - Broader business value for the organization
stakeholderAnalysis.externalImpact: STRING - Effects on customers, partners, or external parties if applicable

priorityAssessment.businessJustification: STRING - Specific business reasons for the urgency level
priorityAssessment.strategicAlignment: STRING - How this supports broader business goals
priorityAssessment.estimatedComplexity: ENUM ['Simple', 'Medium', 'Complex'] - User's perception of effort required

businessRules.validationRules: ARRAY of STRINGS - Order/request validation rules (amounts, quantities, etc.)
businessRules.pricingLogic: STRING - How pricing tiers and discounts are determined
businessRules.approvalWorkflows: ARRAY of STRINGS - Approval chains for different transaction types
businessRules.accessRules: ARRAY of STRINGS - User permissions and access control rules
businessRules.exceptionHandling: ARRAY of STRINGS - How edge cases and exceptions are managed
businessRules.complianceRequirements: ARRAY of STRINGS - Regulatory and policy requirements

userExperience.userJourneys: ARRAY of STRINGS - Complete user flows for each persona
userExperience.accessibilityRequirements: ARRAY of STRINGS - Accessibility standards and accommodations
userExperience.deviceSupport: ARRAY of STRINGS - Supported devices, browsers, screen sizes
userExperience.errorHandling: STRING - How errors and system feedback are presented
userExperience.personalizationFeatures: ARRAY of STRINGS - Customization and preference options
userExperience.onboardingStrategy: STRING - User training and adoption approach
userExperience.notificationPreferences: ARRAY of STRINGS - Alert and communication channels

operationalProcesses.systemFailureHandling: STRING - Procedures when external systems are unavailable
operationalProcesses.escalationProcedures: ARRAY of STRINGS - How urgent requests are prioritized and routed
operationalProcesses.changeManagement: ARRAY of STRINGS - How cancellations, refunds, modifications are handled
operationalProcesses.dataQualityMaintenance: STRING - Procedures to ensure data accuracy and consistency
operationalProcesses.monitoringRequirements: ARRAY of STRINGS - System monitoring and alerting needs
operationalProcesses.supportProcedures: STRING - User support and maintenance approach

integrationRequirements.dataSynchronization: STRING - Frequency and method of data sync with external systems
integrationRequirements.errorRecovery: STRING - How system failures and integration errors are handled
integrationRequirements.performanceBenchmarks: ARRAY of STRINGS - Required response times, throughput, availability
integrationRequirements.securityProtocols: ARRAY of STRINGS - Security standards and authentication methods
integrationRequirements.scalabilityRequirements: STRING - Expected growth and capacity planning
integrationRequirements.disasterRecovery: STRING - Backup and recovery capabilities needed

securityCompliance.dataProtection: STRING - Personal data collection and protection measures
securityCompliance.regulatoryCompliance: ARRAY of STRINGS - GDPR, industry standards, legal requirements
securityCompliance.auditTrail: STRING - Logging and audit trail requirements
securityCompliance.authenticationAuthorization: STRING - User authentication and access control approach
securityCompliance.dataRetention: STRING - Data retention and deletion policies
securityCompliance.encryptionRequirements: ARRAY of STRINGS - Required encryption and security measures

changeAdoption.transitionStrategy: STRING - How users will migrate from current processes
changeAdoption.trainingPlan: STRING - User training and support approach
changeAdoption.resistanceManagement: STRING - How to address change resistance
changeAdoption.communicationPlan: STRING - Stakeholder communication and engagement strategy
changeAdoption.successMeasurement: ARRAY of STRINGS - How adoption success will be measured

gapAnalysis.businessStrategyGaps: ARRAY of STRINGS - Missing business strategy and economics information
gapAnalysis.businessRulesGaps: ARRAY of STRINGS - Undefined business rules and logic
gapAnalysis.userExperienceGaps: ARRAY of STRINGS - Missing UI/UX and user journey details
gapAnalysis.operationalGaps: ARRAY of STRINGS - Undefined operational processes and procedures
gapAnalysis.integrationGaps: ARRAY of STRINGS - Missing integration and technical requirements
gapAnalysis.securityGaps: ARRAY of STRINGS - Undefined security and compliance requirements
gapAnalysis.adoptionGaps: ARRAY of STRINGS - Missing change management and adoption strategy

elicitationSession.facilitator: STRING - Name of person conducting the elicitation
elicitationSession.completenessScore: FLOAT - Score from 0.0 to 1.0 indicating requirement completeness

categoryScores.businessStrategy: FLOAT - Completeness score for business strategy (0.0-1.0)
categoryScores.businessRules: FLOAT - Completeness score for business rules (0.0-1.0)
categoryScores.userExperience: FLOAT - Completeness score for UX requirements (0.0-1.0)
categoryScores.operationalProcesses: FLOAT - Completeness score for operational processes (0.0-1.0)
categoryScores.integrationRequirements: FLOAT - Completeness score for integration requirements (0.0-1.0)
categoryScores.changeAdoption: FLOAT - Completeness score for change management (0.0-1.0)

elicitationSession.clarificationNeeded: ARRAY of STRINGS - Areas requiring further investigation
elicitationSession.nextSteps: ARRAY of STRINGS - Recommended follow-up actions

validation.problemClearlyDefined: BOOLEAN - Problem is understandable to outsiders
validation.solutionVisionArticulated: BOOLEAN - Desired outcome expressed in business terms
validation.impactQuantified: BOOLEAN - Benefits and consequences are specific
validation.businessRulesDefined: BOOLEAN - Business rules and logic comprehensively documented
validation.userExperienceDetailed: BOOLEAN - UI/UX requirements detailed with user journeys
validation.operationalProcessesSpecified: BOOLEAN - Operational processes including exception handling defined
validation.integrationRequirementsDocumented: BOOLEAN - Integration requirements and technical constraints specified
validation.securityComplianceClear: BOOLEAN - Security, privacy and compliance requirements documented
validation.changeAdoptionOutlined: BOOLEAN - Change management and adoption strategy defined

technicalArchitectureGaps.gap: STRING - Specific technical decision or requirement missing
technicalArchitectureGaps.question: STRING - Specific question to resolve this gap
technicalArchitectureGaps.timelineImpact: STRING - Impact on project if unresolved

businessRulesGaps.gap: STRING - Business rule or logic needing clarification
businessRulesGaps.question: STRING - Specific question to resolve this gap
businessRulesGaps.timelineImpact: STRING - Impact on project if unresolved

operationalReadinessGaps.gap: STRING - Operational process or procedure missing
operationalReadinessGaps.question: STRING - Specific question to resolve this gap
operationalReadinessGaps.timelineImpact: STRING - Impact on project if unresolved

workshopQuestions.businessStakeholders: ARRAY of STRINGS - Questions about ROI, success criteria, business rules
workshopQuestions.technicalTeams: ARRAY of STRINGS - Questions about architecture, integration, performance
workshopQuestions.endUsers: ARRAY of STRINGS - Questions about workflows, usability, training needs
workshopQuestions.operations: ARRAY of STRINGS - Questions about deployment, maintenance, support

prioritizedActionPlan.immediateBlockers: ARRAY of STRINGS - Critical gaps preventing project start
prioritizedActionPlan.phase1Requirements: ARRAY of STRINGS - Essential for MVP planning
prioritizedActionPlan.futureClarifications: ARRAY of STRINGS - Can be addressed during development
